title: Ubiquiti USW-Flex-Utility, adapter kit for street light pole applications
description: The USW Flex Utility is an outdoor weatherproof enclosure designed for use with the UniFi Switch Flex, USW-Flex. The USW Flex Utility can be easily mounted on a pole, provides clean cable management and screw lock for security Outdoor weatherproof case Pole holder Gigabit PoE power adapter with terminal block (54V / 1.11A)
